title: Cuneiform Tablet #0014: Old Babylonian Adoption
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a adoption document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a adoption document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Babylonian period. Adoption document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records adoption matters typical of Old Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
